text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (The Satsuki Sho is just around the corner, but...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Dinner time! Dinner time! ♪ Yes, yes, dinner
ti—oh, good evening, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Do you mind if I sit next to you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Okay, gotta fill up now so I can do my
best tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Um, Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! Yes? Sorry! Was I being noisy?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: If you'd like, you can have mine.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(The Classic Triple Crown—a once-in-a-lifetime
honor worthy of dedicating to my sister.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I have to win it... I must! So why am I...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I can't afford to fall behind the others.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Am I... feeling anxious? Is that the problem?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I don't feel like eating anything.)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Come on, Ayabe, at least turn the lights on
if you're here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Munch... What is this? ...It's sweet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, it's my new favorite snack, milk candy!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's suuuper sweet and fills you with energy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If you like it so much, shouldn't you eat it
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I believe in sharing! I'm an Umastagrammer, after
all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Eat up and give it everything you've got on the
track, Ayabe. The Satsuki Sho is coming up soon,
right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You don't want to lose to Top Road and Opera
O, do you? Maybe they didn't race in the Hopeful
Stakes, but they're still rivals you have to beat!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Rivals I have to beat?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Satsuki Sho arrives. On the roster
are the prodigious T.M. Opera O and Narita Top
Road...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like last time, Admire Vega finds herself at
the top of the pre-race popularity poll.
choice_data_list:
(And just like last time, I'm sure she doesn't
care.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: Did something in the magazine worry you?
Did something in the magazine worry you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?! ...No.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's time. I'm off to the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I check out the magazine she left on the table
after leaving the room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A gap still remains between the pages she was
reading. I open it up and see an article featuring
both Narita Top Road and T.M. Opera O as
"runners to watch."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The audience forgets themselves. Lost in their
enthusiasm, they produce a storm of cheers,
screams, and roars.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Here, they solemnize this festival of bravery—this
festival of heroes!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! The overture is nearing its
crescendo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We three valiant heroes will compose a glorious
symphony that binds our generation together.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And the brightest of them all is none other than I,
the great Overlord, T.M. Opera O! Ladies and
gentlemen, try not to avert your eyes!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! Amazing... I mean, I have no idea what
she's talking about... But she's so intense!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah? But Top Road is holding her own too!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fans
text_block_list.text: YOU CAN DO IT, TOP ROOOAD!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thank you for the encouragement!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Please, keep cheering me on. I won't let you
down!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fans
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The rivals I must beat...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (That goes without saying.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(In order to attain victory worth devoting to my
sister, I can't let myself lose.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I won't lose. Not to them, not to anyone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's... all that matters...
